title: Tony's vanilla plus
description: This modpack enhances the vanilla experience without it being to large. Running it on potato pc's should therefore not be any problem.
body:
### Description
This modpack enhances the vanilla experience without it being to large. Running it on potato pc's should therefore not be any problem. 

It enhances a lot of vanilla functions and structures without being completely different. 

While it does add a few features and mobs that aren't in the game, it is focused on only adding minor and vanilla like things.

Another great thing about this modpack is that it also enhances the performance of Minecraft by adding mods like Sodium and XPclumps.

But the greatest feature might be that anybody can join your singleplayer world by just sending an invite, this means that you don't need any servers or be on the same network for multiplayer!
 
If you find your pc struggling to play this modpack, try turning off the shaders with the keybind 'k' or by disabling them in the video settings. 

It is recommended to use this modpack with the curseforge app and not with any other modpack launcher since it otherwise might miss certain mods or other content. But the Modrinth app probably shouldn't be a problem either.

### Note
When downloading the modpack of Modrinth, ou might miss out on certain functions and features, I've therefore also made a complete version that can be downloaded right here: [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ayEw6FAJDnLwpCo0D2nojbQFIBIFMDNn/view?usp=sharing] It's made to be used on curseforge but it would also work on Modrinth.
